Here is the list of signs and their scores:
1. Aries - 7/10 - Natural leadership skills, but can be impulsive.
2. Taurus - 8/10 - Practical and dependable, but may lack creativity.
3. Gemini - 9/10 - Quick-witted and adaptable, but may struggle with commitment.
4. Cancer - 6/10 - Emotional intelligence is high, but can be overly sensitive.
5. Leo - 8/10 - Charismatic and confident, but may come across as arrogant.
6. Virgo - 7/10 - Meticulous and hardworking, but may worry too much.
7. Libra - 9/10 - Diplomatic and balanced, but may struggle with decision-making.
8. Scorpio - 9/10 - Passionate and intense, but may be overly secretive.
9. Sagittarius - 8/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, but may lack follow-through.
10. Capricorn - 7/10 - Ambitious and responsible, but may come across as aloof.
11. Aquarius - 9/10 - Humanitarian and independent, but may be rebellious.
12. Pisces - 8/10 - Empathetic and imaginative, but may be overly emotional.
